source_pr.title: *: sync wait stats loading for stable plan
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/37434

Problem Summary:
Plans are unstable due to async lazy-load of statistics. Sometimes, unreasonable plans cause oom.

### What is changed and how it works?
Make SQL goroutine sync-wait for the stats loading.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [x] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Plans are unstable due to async lazy-load of statistics. Sometimes, unreasonable plans cause oom.
failure_signature: Plans are unstable due to async lazy-load of statistics. Sometimes, unreasonable plans cause oom.
root_cause_explanation: Plans/tests were unstable because statistics were lazy-loaded asynchronously: depending on timing, planning could happen before stats loading finished, leading to different (sometimes unreasonable) plans across runs. This PR stabilizes plan selection by making SQL planning/execution sync-wait for stats loading completion, removing the timing window where partially-loaded stats cause nondeterministic plan choices.
fix_pattern: Synchronize/wait for async statistics loading before planning to avoid nondeterministic plan choices.

evidence: evidence: Plans are unstable due to async lazy-load of statistics. Sometimes, unreasonable plans cause oom.
